title: Tealium Moments API Response
description: Schema for the response from the Tealium Moments API. Contains a targeted slice of visitor context as configured in the engine definition. Maximum payload size is 1 kB per engine.

audiences.description: Audience memberships configured in the engine — key is audience name, value is boolean

badges.description: Badge memberships configured in the engine — key is badge name, value is boolean

metrics.description: Numeric metric attribute values configured in the engine

properties.description: String property attribute values configured in the engine

flags.description: Boolean flag attribute values configured in the engine

dates.description: Date attribute values configured in the engine
